title: 11 Herbal Teas For Puffy Eyes
description: Calendula officinalis teas contains triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce swelling and inflammation in the delicate skin around the eyes, making it a potential remedy for puffy eyes. The flavonoids in Calendula officinalis teas, particularly quercetin and kaempferol, have been shown to have potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help alleviate puffiness and redness.
